author: CasaOS Team
description: NZBGet can run on almost any device - classic PC, NAS, media player, SAT-receiver, WLAN-router, etc. The download area provides precompiled binaries for Windows, macOS, Linux (compatible with many CPUs and platform variants), FreeBSD and Android. For other platforms the program can be compiled from sources.

tips.before_install:
Default Account

| Username | Password |
| -------- | -------- |
| nzbget   | tegbzn6789 |

releaseNotes.en_US:
- NZBGet 26.1 improves archived NZB handling support.
- Adds NzbDirArchiveScan for scanning zip, rar, 7z, and other archives in NzbDir.
- Uses the LinuxServer 26.1.20260522 image build for this release line.
